title: Spawn Eggs, Original
description: Bring back the old spawn egg textures!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6970fce8589e01e392e23ff4fcfdfff9a7e33f24.png)

Snapshot 25w08a has changed the spawn egg textures.

This resourcepack brings back the original spawn egg textures!
